creator: metaf2xml@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Created attachment 164567
patch to update science/metaf2xml to 1.58

Attached a proposed patch to upgrade the port for science/metaf2xml to 1.58. The patch has the following changes:

- bump PORTREVISION to 1.58 (distinfo, Makefile)
- add AMDAR to descriptions (pkg-descr, Makefile)
- revert change which removed trailing slash from URL (required by Porters Handbook, 3.2.1) (pkg-descr)

Please apply the patch. Thanks!
